metadata.description: slang-workflows — provable, .slang-driven multi-agent workflows for Claude Code: a non-LLM executor runs typed workflow files with enforced contracts, tool-scoping, and auto-generated topology/trace diagrams. A standalone shofer.dev Claude Code plugin.

plugins.name: slang-workflows
plugins.description: Run deterministic, .slang-driven multi-agent workflows inside Claude Code. A non-LLM state machine in an MCP server coordinates agents (via the Agent SDK); the top-level session triggers and observes runs.
